blurb: Wildlife powerhouse: fragrant white flower racemes, dark fruit, golden fall color.
spread: Running — rhizomes to 35 ft, forms thickets
seasons: White racemes spring; red-black fruit late summer; gold–orange fall
wildlife: Top Lepidoptera host; bee magnet; birds eat fruit
toxic: Leaves, bark & seeds contain cyanide compounds — toxic to people/pets/livestock; ripe fruit flesh edible, seeds not
